title: Event Executive
description:
About SE7EN FRIDAY

Not just another run of the mill event company in Singapore, SE7EN FRIDAY is made up of various specialists from different facets of production houses, coming together to synergize our expertise and leverage on each event team member's talents. Many of our team members are top, well-known, #1 within the events company Singapore industry, complementing our event industry partners. PASSION is the underlying sense you get from us from the moment we start corresponding and putting your perfect event together.


The very reason why we call our company SE7EN FRIDAY Event Company in Singapore is because we treat every day as a Happy Friday! Our sense of purpose in this industry is clear and we know how to achieve this for our customers.


Job Highlights

  • Conceptualize, Plan & Execute your very own event!
  • Event/Project Incentives (The sky is your ceiling)
  • Career Progression Opportunities (a chance to lead and manage your own team for event in the future)
  • Hands on experience in managing different type of events (Dinner & Dance, Awards, Gala Dinner, Conferences and Teambuilding)

Role Descriptions

  • Brainstorm and Conceptualize ideas & concept for proposal
  • Opportunity to pitch and present event proposal to client
  • Manage and maintain good working relationship with existing business accounts & clientele from both the government & private market sector
  • Sourcing and Acquisition of new client
  • Showcall & Programme management during event day
  • Overseeing and Liaising with various stakeholders involved in the event
  • Provide on-site support for events and any other adhoc duties

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma Holder and Fresh Entry Level is welcomed!
  • Passion for events and is able to work long hours if required (don't worry, you will be compensated accordingly)
  • Effective Oral and Written Communication
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Powerpoint & Excel)
  • Proficient in Google Document, Google Slides and Google Sheets
  • Ability to handle multiple tasks under pressure and meet deadlines
  • Keen attention to small/fine details

Curious to find out more? Check us out on our Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/se7enfriday/?hl=en) and Website (www.se7enfriday.com) to find out of what we do!

We would love to meet up and speak face to face with you.
